title: Savory Smoky Filipino Tofu Skewers
description: A solo dinner dish featuring earthy and flaky Filipino flavors, cooked to perfection on a yakimono grill with peanut oil, served on an iron teppan, this dish is jain friendly.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together peanut oil, soy sauce, vinegar, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto the bamboo skewers.
Place the skewers on the preheated yakimono grill and cook for 10 minutes per side.
Heat the iron teppan over medium heat and brush with a small amount of peanut oil.
Place the cooked skewers on the iron teppan and serve immediately.
